$comment: Design token file for the Timed Button component
$description: Full-width button with a timed progress fill that grows from the left edge to represent elapsed time. Three types: Primary (filled blue), Secondary (outlined), Tertiary (ghost). Four states: Enabled, Pressed, Disabled, Loading. The progress fill overlay is the defining unique element — it sits absolutely positioned behind the label and is clipped by the button's overflow:hidden. Icon color always matches label-color for the same state. Width is 361px — standard mobile viewport minus horizontal padding.

width.description: Full component width — standard mobile viewport (393px) minus 16px horizontal padding on each side

height.description: Fixed button height across all types and states

border-radius.description: 8px corner radius applied to all button types

border-width.description: Border width applied to all button types

padding-horizontal.description: Left and right inset padding inside the button

padding-vertical.description: Top and bottom inset padding inside the button

gap.description: Horizontal gap between leading icon, label text, and trailing icon

typography.description: 18px SemiBold, 28px line-height — larger than a standard button to reflect the prominent timed CTA treatment

size.description: Width and height of the leading and trailing icon placeholders

height.description: Height of the absolute-positioned fill overlay — matches the button height to span the full vertical area

offset.description: Left and top offset to bleed the fill behind the border, preventing a 1px gap between fill and button edge

shadow.description: 0px 1px 2px 0px rgba(16,24,40,0.05) — applied to all Primary states

background.description: #155eef — solid blue fill for the default active state

label-color.description: White label and icon on blue background

progress-fill-background.description: #0040c1 — darker blue overlay that grows from the left to show elapsed time on a Primary button

background.description: Same as Enabled — no background change on press for Primary
#b2ccff — washed-out blue indicating the button is not yet interactive

border-color.description: Full-strength blue border contrasts with the muted background to signal the locked state

label-color.description: White label and icon — readable against the muted blue background

background.description: Same as Enabled — spinner replaces content while background stays the same

shadow.description: 0px 1px 2px 0px rgba(16,24,40,0.05) — applied to all Secondary states

background.description: White background for the outlined secondary treatment

border-color.description: #84adff — light blue border defining the secondary button boundary

label-color.description: #004eeb — dark blue label and icon on white background

progress-fill-background.description: #b2ccff — soft blue fill overlay that grows from the left to show elapsed time on a Secondary button

label-color.description: Same dark blue label as Enabled

background.description: #eff4ff — same tinted background as Pressed, indicating the button is locked

label-color.description: #b2ccff — muted blue label and icon to reinforce the disabled state

background.description: Returns to white background while spinner is active

border-color.description: Lighter than background — retains the borderless feel while adding depth

label-color.description: Same dark blue label as Enabled

background.description: Same as Pressed background — locked state reuses the deeper tint

label-color.description: #b2ccff — muted blue label and icon for the disabled state

background.description: Returns to the lightest ghost tint while spinner is active

border-color.description: Matches background — borderless appearance during loading
